title: 🦠 Chaos Rebirth Embryo
name: Chaos Rebirth Embryo
what_it_is: A visual and symbolic form of primordial potential—life gestating in disorder, forming from the seed of brokenness.
how_to_use: she is chaos reborn—gestating in fractal fluid, her body forming from melted geometry
the egg pulses with strange order—life blooming in chaos-amniotic spiral
animation_behavior: Liquid forms coalesce into symmetry, embryonic shape flickers in chaotic swirl, fractals stabilize into new being
